sections.content: The character moved down and is now overlapping/touching the yellow L-shape. Looking at the image, the character's bottom part is now overlapping with the yellow shape. Let me check what happened to the yellow shape.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what happened after touching the yellow shape
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] > 5:
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash'][:8]}... bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check if yellow shape still exists
yellow_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 5]
print(f"\nYellow objects: {len(yellow_nodes)}")
for n in yellow_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash'][:8]}...")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
